name: codex-fullstack-delivery
description: Full-stack delivery workflow with a DDD backend pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Full-stack agent team with DDD backend workflow.
interface.longDescription: Coordinates frontend, backend, and test agents for contract-first full-stack delivery. Backend work follows the bundled DDD strategic design, tactical design, code generation, review, compile, and test pipeline.
defaultPrompt: Run the backend through the DDD pipeline.
